ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "slug" TEXT /* SEO-friendly URL slug for the post */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body content of the post */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the post was last updated */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date and time the post was published */,
  "published" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the post is published */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the post */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the post belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the post (draft, published, archived) */,
  "meta_description" TEXT /* Brief summary of the post for SEO */,
  "featured_image" TEXT /* File path to the featured image of the post */,
  "slug_history" TEXT /* History of slug changes for SEO purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the author's profile picture */,
  "website" TEXT /* Author's personal website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Author's social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post-tag association */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment */,
  "comment_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the rating belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Rating value (1-5) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the user's profile picture */,
  "activation_status" TEXT /* Activation status of the user */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., author, user) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the media file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the media file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of media file (e.g., image, video) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the media file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the media file was uploaded */,
  "media_title" TEXT /* Title of the media file */,
  "media_description" TEXT /* Description of the media file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the analytics belong to */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been shared */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "ratings_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings the post has received */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the post */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics record was created */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the post */,
  "time_spent" REAL /* Average time spent on the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the follower */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user was followed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "follower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_revisions" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being revised */,
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date and time the revision was created */,
  "revision_body" TEXT /* Body content of the revised post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "revision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_views" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the post */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date and time the post was viewed */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* Referrer URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "user_id")
)
